stemHtml: An aircraft is flying from Amsterdam (52°18.5'N 004°45.9'E) to Alicante (38°16.9'N 000°33.5'W). For this route the pilot has inserted a wind vector of 325°(T)/60 kt. The actual wind is 225°(T)/60 kt. This means the FMS predicted that the (1) _____ and the predicted fuel consumption is (2) _____.

options.a: (1) ETA is too early; (2) too low
options.b: (1) ETA is correct as the FMS automatically corrects with speed control; (2) too high
options.d: (1) EET is too short; (2) correct as the air distance is the same
